summary: v108 adds `BoundedExactAcyclicHomotopyVerdierQuasicategory.homotopyCategoryIso` and a bounded-to-ambient ordinary Verdier comparison via `boundedExactAcyclicHomotopyObjectToIsoClosure_trW`, `boundedExactAcyclicHomotopyVerdierComparison`, and `boundedExactAcyclicHomotopyVerdierComparisonLocalizationIso`. Product remains nonterminal because closed2 hypotheses are not proved unconditionally, homotopy/direct left-right calculus is not unconditional, ordinary triangulated structure is not transferred to `Dbounded`, and no stable infinity-category structure is constructed.
